name: vibeflow
description: AI-Orchestrated Vibe Coding Framework with Multi-AI Consensus and Truth Validation. Combines SDLC orchestration with requirements-first quality assurance.

mode.title: Workflow Mode
mode.description: Workflow mode: 'solo' (single developer, SQLite, lighter hooks) or 'team' (multi-dev, PostgreSQL, full consensus)

domain.title: Project Domain
domain.description: Project domain: 'financial', 'e-commerce', 'healthcare', or 'general'. Affects quality thresholds and release decision weights.

db_connection.title: Database Connection
db_connection.description: PostgreSQL connection string for project state (team mode only). Leave empty for solo mode (uses SQLite).

openai_model.title: OpenAI Model
openai_model.description: OpenAI model for ChatGPT reviews via codex CLI (default: gpt-4o). Leave empty to skip ChatGPT reviews.

gemini_model.title: Gemini Model
gemini_model.description: Google model for Gemini reviews via gemini CLI (default: gemini-2.0-flash). Leave empty to skip Gemini reviews.

figma_token.title: Figma Personal Access Token
figma_token.description: Personal access token for the Figma REST API (used by design-bridge MCP). Create at figma.com → Settings → Personal access tokens. Leave empty to disable Figma-dependent skills.

github_token.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_token.description: Personal access token for the GitHub REST API (used by dev-ops MCP to trigger workflows, check runs, list artifacts). Needs `actions:write` + `contents:read` at minimum. Leave empty to disable CI-dependent skills.
